enrichment method: The complex containing mH2a/2m-3′B pre-mRNA, SLBP and the in vitro assembled core U7 snRNP bound to 139N FLASH was immobilized on streptavidin (SA) beads
fractionation method: the complex was purified by size exclusion chromatography (SEC)
labeling: the purified semi-recombinant U7 snRNP contains all components essential for the catalytic activity.
reduction reagent: the protein was eluted with a buffer containing 20 mM Tris pH 7.5, 500 mM NaCl, 500 mM imidazole, 5% glycerol, and 10 mM β-mercaptoethanol.
